headline: From Stuck
to Unstoppable.
In 6 Weeks.
duration: 6 Weeks · 3 Focused Sprints of 2 Weeks Each · 1:1 Coaching
description: A structured, human-centred journey designed to help mid-career professionals break through career confusion, reclaim their identity, rebuild confidence, and take decisive action toward a career and life they are proud of.
forYouIf: You feel trapped in the wrong career or role
You're seeking alignment between purpose and profession
You feel stuck, unfulfilled, or unclear on your next move
You're battling self-doubt, limiting beliefs, or identity confusion
outcomesTitle: What You Will Walk Away With
outcomes: Clarity on your purpose, direction, and goals
Confidence to make bold decisions and take consistent action
Removal of limiting beliefs and emotional blocks
A practical roadmap for career or business growth
A reclaimed sense of identity and pride in who you are becoming
